commentaries.author: Ephrem The Syrian
commentaries.content: Obadiah shows here that the Edomites must be subjected to captivity because of their pride and the enmity they held against their brothers. In a different sense he says that the devil is made least, as the words that follow are extremely suitable to him as well. .

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Contemptible. The nations of Chaldea, were far more potent. Yet Edom must be brought still lower.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
